allowButton.label: Allow / Proceed / Continue for classified non-gates only

notes: Copy this file to sally-dink-non-gate-clicker.local.json and fill Sally-local screen coordinates.
Keep Dink/Codex in the fixed Sally position before using -LiveClick.
Only click Allow after the prompt is classified as PROCEED: not a human gate.
Do not use this for login, OAuth, secrets, billing, push, merge, deploy, SQL, production data, final approval, or unknown prompts.
